hero.title_line1: We don't just set up CRM.
hero.subtitle: Through segmentation, customer journeys, and multi-channel CRM operations, we turn acquired users into active, loyal, and profitable customers.

pain.title: Why Isn't Your CRM Delivering Results?
pain.subtitle: Most brands treat CRM as a tool, an email channel, or a campaign platform. The real problem runs much deeper.
pain.item1_desc: Customer acquisition costs keep climbing, yet there's no strategy to generate revenue from existing customers.
pain.item2_desc: Your CRM system is used for mass emailing. Strategic segmentation and automation are missing entirely.
pain.item3_desc: Customer journeys are undefined, segmentation is non-existent, and retention flows haven't been built.

services_section.title: We Build Lifecycle CRM Systems
services_section.subtitle: We focus on how to operate CRM, not just how to set it up.
services_section.s1_desc: We create CRM roadmaps aligned with your growth goals, including KPI definition and customer segmentation.
services_section.s1_long: CRM strategy creates the roadmap your brand needs to systematically manage customer relationships. We start with KPI definition, customer segmentation, goal setting, and CRM maturity analysis. We deliver a measurable, actionable strategy tailored to each brand's needs.
services_section.s2_desc: We design journeys that connect every touchpoint to revenue through activation, retention, and win-back flows.
services_section.s2_long: Customer journey design optimizes every step from first contact to loyalty. We build welcome series, cart abandonment, post-purchase, win-back, and re-engagement flows with multi-channel (email, SMS, push) automation.
services_section.s3_desc: We continuously optimize your CRM with performance analysis, A/B tests, and process improvements.
services_section.s3_long: With our data-driven approach, we continuously monitor and optimize your CRM performance. Cohort analysis, A/B testing, funnel optimization, and segment-based performance tracking make your decision-making data-driven.
services_section.s4_desc: We build content and messaging strategies that deliver the right message to the right segment at the right time.
services_section.s4_long: CRM communication strategy covers designing content and messages specific to each segment. Email copywriting, visual design, A/B test scenarios, and multi-channel messaging optimization increase your open and conversion rates.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: Our 4-step approach builds your CRM system from the ground up.
process.step1_desc: We analyze your current CRM infrastructure, data quality, and process maturity.
process.step1_long: With our CRM Readiness Audit, we analyze your infrastructure, data quality, segmentation level, automation maturity, and reporting capacity in detail. We deliver a clear status report and prioritized action plan.
process.step2_desc: We design segmentation, lifecycle journeys, and automation flows.
process.step2_long: Based on audit results, we design your CRM strategy and customer journeys. Segmentation model, lifecycle stages, automation flows, and KPI framework are defined at this stage.
process.step3_desc: We bring flows to life, run tests, and track performance.
process.step3_long: We implement the designed flows in your CRM platform. Email/SMS templates, automation rules, segmentation triggers, and reporting dashboards are built and tested at this stage.
process.step4_desc: We measure results against KPIs and establish continuous improvement loops.
process.step4_long: Post-launch, we closely track performance, running A/B tests and cohort analyses for continuous optimization. Monthly performance reports and strategic recommendations ensure your system keeps improving.

diff.title: Why Ludens Works?
diff.subtitle: We don't send campaigns. We build CRM systems.

cta_section.title: Ready to Unlock Your CRM's True Potential?
cta_section.subtitle: Discover the strengths and gaps of your current system with a free CRM audit.

about.title: We Build CRM as a System
about.subtitle: Most brands treat CRM as a tool. We build CRM as a system that understands user behavior, creates the right segments, and connects every touchpoint to growth.
about.mission_desc: To help e-commerce and digital brands generate sustainable revenue growth from their existing customers.
about.vision_desc: To become the reference CRM agency in lifecycle marketing across Turkey and Europe.
about.approach_desc: We focus on how to operate CRM, not just how to set it up. Through segmentation, lifecycle journeys, messaging, and optimization, we create lasting value.
about.v1_desc: Every decision we make is backed by data.
about.v4_desc: All our processes are open and trackable.
